name: aletheia-os
description: Repo-native truth layer for AI-assisted research and engineering. Maintains project truth, architecture constraints, research evidence, decisions, risks, and agent attribution in .aletheia/.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-native project truth layer for AI-assisted research and engineering.
interface.longDescription: AletheiaOS keeps project truth in .aletheia/: mission, active state, system graph, architecture constraints, research evidence, decisions, contracts, risks, and agent attribution for Codex and other agents.
defaultPrompt: Orient on truth and show hook-free next actions.
Validate and dry-run checkpoint project truth.
